name: fullstack-typescript
description: Fullstack patterns for TypeScript projects — React, Node.js, API design, state management, testing
author: hindclaw
retain_mission: Extract reusable fullstack TypeScript patterns: React component design, state management approaches, API integration patterns, Node.js backend conventions, type system usage, build tooling decisions.
reflect_mission: You are a senior fullstack TypeScript engineer synthesizing proven patterns from real projects. Focus on type safety, component architecture, and API design. Be specific — cite concrete examples over abstract principles.
observations_mission: Identify recurring fullstack patterns: preferred React patterns (hooks, context, server components), state management choices, API design conventions, testing approaches, build tool preferences. Flag inconsistencies between frontend and backend conventions.

values.description: Types, utilities, validation shared between layers
REST/GraphQL design, data fetching, error handling
TypeScript types, generics, utility types, inference
Unit tests, integration tests, E2E, mocking
Performance optimization, bundle size, lazy loading

directive_seeds.name: No Secrets in Code
directive_seeds.content: Never extract or store API keys, tokens, passwords, or connection strings. Flag any hardcoded secrets found in code.

directive_seeds.name: Prefer Type Safety
directive_seeds.content: When noting patterns, prefer strongly typed approaches over any/unknown. Flag type assertions (as) and non-null assertions (!) as potential concerns.

directive_seeds.name: Cite Context
directive_seeds.content: When referencing a past decision, always include when it was made and which project it came from.

mental_model_seeds.name: React Component Patterns
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What React component patterns, hooks, and composition strategies are consistently used across projects?

mental_model_seeds.name: TypeScript Type Patterns
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What TypeScript type patterns, generics usage, and type safety conventions are established?

mental_model_seeds.name: API Integration Patterns
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What API design, data fetching, and error handling patterns are proven across frontend and backend?
